title: Participants_scRNAseq
author: Pich-Bavastro, Christine
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This table contains results from the single cell RNA sequencing of 6 healthy participants, 4 samples per participants (L1: 1h_left, R1: 1h_right, L24: 24h_left, R24: 24_right). It can be converted into Seurat object.
steps_raw: This table contains results from the single cell RNA sequencing of 6 healthy participants, 4 samples per participants (L1: 1h_left, R1: 1h_right, L24: 24h_left, R24: 24_right). It can be converted into Seurat object.
